data_schema: Id(int); Elevation, Aspect, Slope, distances, Hillshade_* (numeric); Wilderness_Area1-4 and Soil_Type1-40 (binary one-hot); Cover_Type TARGET (integer classes, mostly 1-7). Multi-class classification, metric = accuracy. sample_submission: Id,Cover_Type (integer class).
extra_notes: VERY large data (4,000,000 rows) with 7 forest-cover classes. MUST subsample to ~150,000 rows for CV to fit the time budget. Cover_Type is a multi-class integer target; use LightGBM multiclass or similar. Some classes are rare; use stratified folds. CV_SCORE = mean OOF accuracy (higher is better). Predict integer class labels for the full test set.
